heroDescription: Professional experience, internships and hands-on projects in real-world environments.

stage-serfa.label: Training Internship - Full Stack Developer - Business Management Application
tasks: Design and development of an internal management application (full architecture).
Backend development using Spring Boot: secure REST APIs, role management, and authentication.
Frontend development using ReactJS/TypeScript: responsive interfaces, forms, API integration.
Design and administration of the PostgreSQL database (schema, migrations, query optimization).
Implementation of best practices: documentation, unit/integration testing.

stage-greta.label: Training Internship - Project Manager & Developer – E-commerce Website Redesign
tasks: Led the website redesign project and full creation of an e-commerce site.
Coordinated a team (task allocation, progress tracking).
Designed and integrated the UI/UX (mockups, visual identity, usability).
Developed and customized using WordPress/WooCommerce (themes, plugins, optimization).
Implemented e-commerce features (product catalog, online payments, order management).
Prepared the site for launch and performed basic SEO optimization.
